name: integration__post_launched_my_first_saas_yesterday
method: post: launched my first saas yesterday. woke up to 3 paying users and broo i’m actually shaking 😭 😭 😭 😭 | content: aboutdiscussions and useful links for saas owners, online business owners, and more.

phases.name: scrape_celebration_posts
steps: scrape r/SaaS + r/startups for 'first paying user' and 'first sale' posts
extract mentioned launch tactics: pricing, acquisition channel, tech stack, timeline

phases.name: generate_content
steps: generate 3 celebration-format posts for PRINTMAXX app launches using extracted patterns
adapt hook structures for X/LinkedIn/Reddit formats

phases.name: queue_distribution
steps: add to CONTENT/social/posting_queue/ with platform tags
